title: Danny Moore
extract: Danny Moore (born 2 November 1971) is an Australian former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. An Australian international and Queensland State of Origin representative who played most of his career either at Centre or on the Wing, he played his club football in Australia for the Manly-Warringah Sea Eagles (with whom he won the 1996 ARL premiership) and the North Queensland Cowboys. He also played in England for the Wigan Warriors (with whom he won 1998's Super League III) and the London Broncos.1st player to win a grand final in the Northern and Southern Hemisphere
